subjects.description: A solid structural wall that terminates the industrial-zone street, its flat vertical face entirely covered by a hyper-realistic trompe-l'oeil mural depicting an open road stretching toward a distant horizon beneath a clear blue sky
subjects.appearance_details: The painted mural shows asphalt lane markings receding to a vanishing point, soft cumulus clouds, and a graduated blue sky; a faint flat sheen under the shadowless overcast light, and the faint seam where the mural meets adjacent structures, reveal it is a flat painted surface
subjects.relationship: It is the terminal obstacle the ego vehicle must recognize and stop before; it deceptively mimics a continuation of the street
subjects.location: center frame, filling the far end of the street
subjects.orientation: facing directly toward the camera/ego vehicle
subjects.action: Standing as a fixed barrier closing off the road
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the ego vehicle approaches, then stabilizes as the vehicle stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, an autonomous passenger car, seen only through its forward-facing point of view as it travels down the industrial-zone street under overcast noon
subjects.appearance_details: Implied by the dashboard-level ego perspective; smooth motion suggests a modern sedan with advanced driver-assistance sensors
subjects.relationship: The observer and protagonist of the scene, approaching and correctly recognizing the mural wall
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the street toward the wall
subjects.pose: moving forward then decelerating to a halt
subjects.action: Driving down the street, then braking to a smooth controlled stop before the wall
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady forward motion to deceleration to a complete, sustained stop.

background_setting: An industrial-zone street at overcast noon, flanked by low warehouses and factory buildings with corrugated metal and concrete facades, loading docks, chain-link fences and a few bare late-autumn trees. The worn concrete roadway runs straight ahead with faded lane markings. The street dead-ends at a solid structural wall whose surface bears a hyper-realistic mural of an open road and clear sky, creating an optical illusion of the road continuing beneath a flat grey sky. No traffic signs of any kind are present anywhere in the scene.

lighting.shadows: Soft, nearly shadowless ambient light with faint gradients
lighting.illumination_effect: Even grey daylight flattens the scene; the painted mural's bright blue sky reads as slightly too vivid against the dull overcast, and subtle brush sheen betrays the flat surface

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective with the industrial street receding toward the mural wall at the vanishing point; warehouses frame the road on both sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted concrete greys, rust and metal tones, dull sky and the painted mural's incongruously vivid blue
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating warehouse bays, corrugated metal ridges and faded lane markings

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking dolly (ego vehicle motion) decelerating to static
cinematography.focus: The mural wall and the full length of the industrial street ahead under flat light

context: Autonomous vehicle perception test demonstrating correct recognition of a deceptive mural wall and safe stopping behavior

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels steadily forward down the industrial-zone street toward the mural wall at the far end.
The vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration as it recognizes the solid wall painted to look like an open road.
The vehicle comes to a complete stop before the wall and remains stationary, holding the view of the mural under flat overcast light.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward down the straight industrial street, the mural wall growing larger ahead while warehouses and loading docks pass on either side.
segments.key_changes: Steady approach; wall increases in apparent size under flat grey light.
segments.camera: Forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates smoothly as it recognizes the wall as a solid barrier rather than open road.
segments.key_changes: Forward speed decreases; the mural fills more of the frame.
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing to a halt.

segments.description: The vehicle is fully stopped before the wall and remains stationary, holding a steady view of the trompe-l'oeil mural under overcast sky.
segments.key_changes: No motion; the scene is held static for over two seconds.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward down a flat-lit, sign-free industrial street under overcast noon, the road appearing to continue into a painted open sky at the far end. Through 0:01 the mural wall grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed. By 0:02 the vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration, having correctly identified the wall as a solid structural barrier painted with a hyper-realistic road-and-sky mural. From 0:03 onward the vehicle has come to a complete stop a safe distance before the wall, and it remains stationary through 0:05, holding the view of the deceptive painted surface under diffuse grey light.
audio_description: Ambient industrial daytime sounds: the low hum of the vehicle's electric motor and tires on worn concrete, distant machinery drone and a dull wind. As the vehicle slows, a soft regenerative braking whir is audible, followed by the quiet of the stationary vehicle. No speech or music.
